caption: The video appears to be the conclusion of an educational lecture on Cryogenic Engineering, presented by Prof. M D Atrey from the Department of Mechanical Engineering at IIT Bombay. The screen displays a simple slide with a "Thank You!" message centered in a blue rectangular box against a white background. This slide is likely the final one in the presentation, signaling the end of the lecture. The NPTEL logo is visible in the bottom left corner, indicating that this lecture is part of the National Programme on Technology Enhanced Learning series. The cursor is also visible, suggesting that the presenter may have been navigating through the slides. The overall setting suggests a formal academic environment aimed at teaching and sharing knowledge in the field of cryogenic engineering.
